content:
MODULE: cosmos.tools.security.threat_analyzer
FILE: cosmos/tools/security/threat_analyzer.py (504 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Threat Analyzer

"Good news, everyone! I can identify threats before they become catastrophes!"

Threat intelligence and indicator analysis for security research.

CLASSES:
- ThreatType(Enum): Types of threats.
- ThreatSeverity(Enum): Threat severity levels.
- ThreatIndicator: A threat indicator (IOC).
- ThreatReport: Threat analysis report.
- ThreatAnalyzer: Threat intelligence analyzer.

Capabilities:
- IOC extraction and classification
  Methods: def extract_iocs(self, text: str) -> List[ThreatIndicator]
  Methods: def analyze_indicator(self, indicator: ThreatIndicator) -> ThreatIndicator
  Methods: async def analyze_text(self, text: str) -> ThreatReport
  Methods: def add_to_database(self, indicator: ThreatIndicator)
  Methods: def export_indicators(self, indicators: List[ThreatIndicator], format: str='csv') -> str
